sources.title: Tides — The Moon's Role
sources.text: Tides are primarily caused by the gravitational pull of the Moon on Earth's oceans.

sources.title: Tides — The Sun's Contribution
sources.text: The Sun also exerts a gravitational influence on the tides, though its effect is roughly half that of the Moon.

mock.claim: Tides are primarily caused by the gravitational pull of the Moon, with a smaller contribution from the Sun.
mock.output: Tides are primarily caused by the gravitational pull of the Moon on Earth's oceans [S1], and the Sun also exerts a gravitational influence on the tides, with a smaller effect [S2].
